issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Pair WhatsApp to an AI agent with daily 9am Telegram standup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs npm install -g openclaw@latest, openclaw channels login for QR pairing, edits ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with channels.whatsapp.allowFrom and bindings, and uses openclaw cron add with --cron, --tz, --announce, --channel, --to as documented; baseline cannot produce any of these CLI invocations because the project is OpenClaw-specific and unknown without the skill.

scenarios.name: Webhook from GitHub Actions to deliver a WhatsApp CI notification
scenarios.rationale: Treatment enables hooks with token + mappings (action: 'agent', deliver: true, channel: 'whatsapp', to: '+1...') and POSTs to /hooks/<name> with Authorization: Bearer header as in the skill; baseline invents a Twilio/CallMeBot flow because OpenClaw's hooks API is project-specific.
